summary: Delayed verifier proof for Frantic bounty #11. A public artifact was published at a stable raw GitHub URL, a delivery was submitted, and the Frantic verifier delayed url.live check scheduler was observed transitioning from immediate-pass to scheduled-waiting to post-window-recheck, ending in a final receipt.
observations: Public artifact published as a JSON file at https://raw.githubusercontent.com/armstrongsam25/runx-demo/main/bounty-11/artifact.json
Delivery submitted to bounty #11 via Frantic API with evidence_json and report artifacts bound by name
Immediate verifier checks ran: url.live returned HTTP 200 for the public artifact URL
Verifier scheduled a delayed url.live recheck with blocks_acceptance=true and a not_before timestamp in the future
The delayed check entered waiting state, deferring acceptance until the not_before window elapsed
Post-window recheck fired after the scheduled window elapsed, confirming the artifact was still live
Final receipt was produced reflecting the completed delayed check sequence with verifier timestamps
